rls.qual: (is_project_participant(project_id) OR has_role('dept_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('college_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM documents d
  WHERE ((d.id = document_versions.document_id) AND (is_project_participant(d.project_id) OR has_role('dept_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('college_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text)))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM evaluations e
  WHERE ((e.id = grading_scores.evaluation_id) AND (e.panelist_id = auth.uid()))))

((generated_by = auth.uid()) OR has_role('dept_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('college_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (document_versions dv
     JOIN documents d ON ((d.id = dv.document_id)))
  WHERE ((dv.id = annotations.document_version_id) AND (is_project_participant(d.project_id) OR has_role('dept_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text)))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (document_versions dv
     JOIN documents d ON ((d.id = dv.document_id)))
  WHERE ((dv.id = annotations.document_version_id) AND (is_project_participant(d.project_id) OR has_role('dept_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text)))))

(has_role('sys_admin'::text) OR has_role('dept_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('college_coordinator'::text) OR (student_id IN ( SELECT students.id
   FROM students
  WHERE (students.profile_id = auth.uid()))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM project_members pm

(is_project_participant(project_id) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text) OR has_role('dept_coordinator'::text) OR has_role('college_coordinator'::text))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ((annotations a
     JOIN document_versions dv ON ((dv.id = a.document_version_id)))
     JOIN documents d ON ((d.id = dv.document_id)))
  WHERE ((a.id = annotation_history.annotation_id) AND (is_project_participant(d.project_id) OR has_role('coordinator'::text) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text)))))

((id = auth.uid()) OR has_role('coordinator'::text) OR has_role('adviser'::text) OR has_role('panelist'::text) OR has_role('sys_admin'::text))
